<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="page2" name="Page 2 — Project Management"> <mxGraphModel dx="706" dy="632" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="750" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="10" value="SumbiTheses System" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;spacingTop=5;align=center;arcSize=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="29" width="420" height="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" value="Project Management" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="69" width="360" height="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="109" value="UC09: Create Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="99" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="110" value="UC10: Edit Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="164" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="111" value="UC11: Delete Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="229" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="112" value="UC12: Upload Attachments" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="294" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="113" value="UC13: Manage External Links" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="359" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="114" value="UC14: Sign Up for Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="424" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="115" value="UC15: Cancel Signup" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="489" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="116" value="UC16: View Project Signups" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="554" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="117" value="UC17: Assign Student to Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="619" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="590" y="324" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="201" value="Supervisor" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#9b59b6;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="590" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#3498db;opacity=50;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry source="200" target="112" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="301" value="" id="302" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#2ecc71;" parent="1" source="200" target="114" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="501" value="<i>&lt;&lt;extend&gt;&gt;</i>
undo signup" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontSize=10;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#555555;" parent="1" source="114" target="115" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="600" value="Admin also uses UC11: Delete Project (see Page 4)" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=left;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="729" width="300" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
